dataAttributeEnumValues.nameEnum: Multiple generator start-stop services is supported
Accumulated generator runtime is available on the Tga attribute.
Needs active MQTT topic refreshing with keep-alives instead of using retained messages.
Uses new VRM config security attributes
DESS values set on Venus (Battery balancing, capacity, operation mode)
